summary: Pool Transitions and Reports Module Testing Complete. Backend: 30/30 tests passed. Frontend: Reports page UI verified with report generation, CSV/PDF export working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/orders/pool/1 - Pool 1 endpoint returns tickets
Backend: GET /api/orders/pool/2 - Pool 2 endpoint returns tickets
Backend: GET /api/orders/pool/3 - Invalid pool number returns 400
Backend: POST /api/orders/{id}/force-pool-2 - Admin can force ticket to Pool 2
Backend: Pool filtering logic - No overlap between Pool 1 and Pool 2
Backend: POST /api/reports/tickets_created/generate - Works with date filters
Backend: POST /api/reports/sla_compliance/export/pdf - Returns PDF data with brand colors
Backend: Report with date filter works
Backend: Report with status filter works
Backend: Report with SLA state filter works
Backend: Pool 2 notification fields exist on orders
Backend: send_pool_assignment_email function exists in services/email.py
Frontend: Reports page loads with data-testid='reports-page'
Frontend: Available Reports panel shows all 13 reports by category
Frontend: Filters panel with date range, status, category, team, assignee filters
Frontend: SLA Compliance Summary report generates with summary cards
Frontend: Open Ticket Aging report shows buckets and data table
Frontend: CSV export button triggers download
critical_code_review_comments: Pool 1 → Pool 2 transition logic correctly implemented in check_pool_transitions() - tickets open >24h move to Pool 2
Background task in server_v2.py calls check_pool_transitions(db) every 5 minutes
send_pool_assignment_email() correctly sends to Vendors when tickets enter Pool 2
Pool filtering: Partners see Pool 1 (first 24h), Vendors see Pool 2 (after 24h)
Reports module has 13 canned reports covering Volume, Aging, Performance, SLA, Distribution, Escalation, Workflow categories
CSV export returns proper content-type and content-disposition headers
PDF export returns JSON data with brand colors for frontend PDF generation using jsPDF
SMTP not configured - emails are MOCKED and logged to console
seed_data_creation: Test order created and cleaned up during pool transition testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pool transitions and Reports module fully verified: 1) Pool 1 → Pool 2 transition logic works - tickets open >24h automatically move to Pool 2, 2) Background task calls check_pool_transitions() every 5 minutes, 3) send_pool_assignment_email() notifies Vendors when tickets enter Pool 2 (SMTP MOCKED - logged to console), 4) Pool filtering works - Partners see Pool 1, Vendors see Pool 2, 5) Reports module has 13 canned reports with full filter support, 6) CSV export works with proper headers, 7) PDF export returns data for frontend jsPDF generation.

pool_1_to_pool_2_transition.description: Tickets open >24h automatically move from Pool 1 to Pool 2

pool_2_notification_trigger.description: check_pool_transitions() called in background task every 5 minutes

pool_2_email_notification.description: send_pool_assignment_email() sends to Vendors - SMTP not configured, emails logged to console

pool_filtering.description: Partners see Pool 1, Vendors see Pool 2, Admins see both

reports_tickets_created.description: tickets_created report returns data with date/count columns

reports_sla_compliance.description: sla_compliance report returns compliance_rate in summary

reports_csv_export.description: CSV export endpoint returns proper CSV file with headers

reports_pdf_export.description: PDF export endpoint returns JSON data with brand colors for frontend PDF generation

mocked_apis_list: Email notifications (SMTP not configured) - logged to console
